### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Aggregates](Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Aggregates.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Aggregates')

## EventStoreProjection\<TReadModel\> Class

Abstract base class for event\-sourced read\-model projections\.
Provides reflection\-based Apply method discovery for typed event handling\.
Concrete projections declare `public void Apply(TEvent e)` methods
which are automatically discovered and invoked during event replay\.

```csharp
public abstract class EventStoreProjection<TReadModel>
    where TReadModel : class, new()
```
#### Type parameters

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Aggregates.EventStoreProjection_TReadModel_.TReadModel'></a>

`TReadModel`

The read model type that this projection builds\.

## EventStoreProjection\<TReadModel\>\.Project\(IEnumerable\) Method

Projects events onto a read model by replaying them through typed Apply methods\.

```csharp
public TReadModel Project(System.Collections.IEnumerable events);
```
